title: Senior Doctor - Aster DM Healthcare Capital India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Aster DM Healthcare Capital India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
